JOIN THE OTTAWA PHYSIOTHERAPY & SPORT CLINICS TEAM TODAY!

We have built a team of multidisciplinary health care providers that work together to provide our community with a reliable resource when help is needed to heal or improve quality of life. We work with athletes that need to improve peak performance or rehabilitate injuries. We cater to everyday people dealing with nagging injuries or persistent pain.
